title: Il viale della speranza
writer: Franco Cannarozzo, Gino De Santis, Ettore Maria Margadonna
actors: Cosetta Greco, Marcello Mastroianni, Liliana Bonfatti
plot: Joys and disappointments of three young girls who dreaming of making a career in film: Luisa has talent and triumphs; Franca tries to seduce a producer, however no artistic skills, Giuditta, the most inexperienced and naive, will ...
